title: The One Where Rachel Is Late

lines.text: Central Perk, Joey is showing everyone a poster as Ross enters.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey! What are you guys looking at?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh, it's a poster for that World War I movie that I'm in, check it out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah? Wow! It looks really violent!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh-huh! I know. I'm coming soon to a theater near you! I'm in THX! I'm unsuitable for children!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Now I cannot wait to see this.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah, yeah, it's already generating Oscar buzz.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I started that!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: I thought I did! Oh hey guess what? The premiere is next week and you're all invited! (They all gasp.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Are we gonna take a limo?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Sure! Why not?!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh I love taking limos when nobody died!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well obviously I won't be able to come, for those of you who haven't checked their calendars today is my due date. Well y'know, I just want to take a moment and thank you guys for how great you've been during this time. I really couldn't have done it without you. And I have loved these last nine months! And even though I am so looking forward to the next part, I am really gonna miss being pregnant.
Central Perk, time lapse, and Rachel is entering still pregnant.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: That's right, still no baby! (To Monica, Joey, and Chandler on the couch) Come on people! Please make some room!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh sweetie, maybe you'd be more comfortable here? (Gets up from the green armchair.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: You. Like you haven't done enough.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Look, I-I know how miserable you are, I wish there was something I can do. I mean I wish I were a seahorse. (She glares at him) Because with seahorses it's the male, they carry the babies. And then also umm, I'd be far away in the sea. (He sits back down.)
Rachel turns and looks at the group on the couch and they move over. Chandler measures the room they've made with his arm and decides it's not enough and they all move over again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: God. (Sits down.) I have never been so uncomfortable in my entire life!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh I know, I've been there. I remember toward the end...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (interrupting her) Oh Phoebe, that's a great story. Can you tell it to me when you're getting me some iced tea? (Phoebe gets up and Rachel groans.) (To the baby) Oh God, get out! Get out!! Get out!! Get out!!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Let's. (Everyone gets up and leaves Rachel.)
Opening Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Phoebe, Chandler, Joey, and Monica are there as Rachel enters.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Hey! Did you have the baby yet?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Do you want me to come over there and sit on you? 'Cause I'll do it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What are you doing here so early?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: They sent me home from work. They were like, "Start your maternity leave now! Just rest, get ready for the baby." Well y'know what? Screw 'em! If they don't want me there, I'll just hang out with you guys.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Or you can do volunteer work.
Joey's cell phone rings and he answers it.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hello?

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: Joey! It's Estelle! Great news, I was able to get you and one guest tickets to your premiere.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: One guest? You told me I can have six tickets!

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: Well, I sold four of them on Ebay. You'll be sitting next to HotGuy372.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh my God. So that's it?! I only get to bring one guest?

lines.speaker: Estelle
lines.text: Yeah, what time do you wanna pick me up? (Joey hangs up on her.) Hello?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (to Monica, Chandler, and Phoebe) Did you hear that? I only get one extra ticket to my premiere. So some how I have to pick between you three and Ross.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (overhearing that) What-what about me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You said you didn't want to go.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I don't. But I would still like to be acknowledged. What? Just because I'm pregnant you think I'm invisible.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Definitely not invisible.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well, well Ross didn't care enough to be here, so I think he's out. You snooze you lose.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: He's not snoozing, he's teaching a class.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well then somebody's snoozing. Joey, not that this uh should affect you at all, but if you were to pick me, I was planning on wearing a sequined dress, cut down to here. (Points to her stomach just above her belly button.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I haven't seen this dress.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Star in a movie.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Joey, you pick who ever you want. Okay? You just listen to your heart. What does it tell you? (Mimicking a heartbeat and tapping her chest.) Phoebe, Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Well uh...I think I want to take Chandler.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: (still mimicking a heartbeat, only faster) Phoebe-Phoebe-Phoebe-Phoebe-Burrrrr! (Mimics the sound of a cardiac monitor going off.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You really want to take me?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah! Yeah! I mean I'm sorry, I wish I can take everybody, but y'know Chandler always supported my career. He's paid for acting classes and head shots and stuff and well this will be my way of paying you back.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: So you're never actually going to pay me back?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute, just because he paid for your head shots you're gonna take him? Joey, I don't think you're comprehending just how slutty this dress is!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: It's not just the stuff he paid for, I mean it's-it's everything. Y'know? He read lines with me. He-he went with me on auditions when I was really nervous, and then he consoled me after I didn't get parts that I really wanted. You always believed in me man. Even, even when I didn't believe in myself.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I always knew you were gonna make it. I'm so proud of you.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Thanks. That means a lot to me.
They look at each other and smile for a while.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Mon, maybe one of these guys wants to wear your dress.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (in a manly voice) I'm gonna go shave. (Gets up.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: (in a manly voice) Yeah well, I'm gonna go spit. (He goes into the bedroom. On his way out, Joey gives Rachel a wide berth.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I have to pee. If I don't come out in five minutes it's because I've choked to death on the potpourri stink. (Goes into the bathroom.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: When she comes out, you hold her nose, I'll blow in her mouth, and the kid will just (makes a popping sound) right out of her.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's over a week late! She gotta have it today, right?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: I don't know. I-I think it's still gonna be a while.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hmm, care to make it interesting? I'll bet you that she'll have it by this time tomorrow.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: You're on!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay, how much?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: One hundred thousand dollars!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How about fifty bucks?

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Fine! I'll call Zurich and move some money around.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (calling from the bathroom) All right, who's turn is it to help me get up!
They both look at each other, then Phoebe gets an idea.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: No one's here! (Monica looks at her.) Oh damnit!
The World Premiere of Over There, Joey and Chandler are arriving in a limo and are about to walk down the red carpet.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: This is so exciting! It's so glamorous! People taking our picture. How do I look?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: A little tall.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Do you mind crouching down a little bit, so that I look taller? (Chandler does so) There you go. (And they walk down the red carpet.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: It's just so glamorous.
Monica and Chandler's, Rachel is entering, still pregnant.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh hey Mon? Rach is here! Ohh, you're still pregnant. Oh, I'm sorry. I know how uncomfortable you are. Y'know what? You look great. Yeah, like fifty bucks.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I have to go pee. Apparently this baby thinks that my bladder is a squeeze toy. (Goes to the bathroom.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Damnit! Damnit!! Here's your fifty bucks! (Pays Phoebe.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: It's interesting that you lost. Now, I forget, do you like to lose?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Now stop it! Double or nothing that she has it by tomorrow!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Fine! You're on!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Until then, General Grant, why don't you set up camp (She puts the bill in her bra) right there.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (entering) Hey is Rachel here? We have a doctor's appointment.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: She's in the bathroom.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Rach, we gotta go.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: In a minute!!!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: People ask me why we're not together, I just don't know what to tell them.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (entering) All right, all right. Let's go!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh, do you wanna go change first? The doctor's keeping the office open late for us, but if you hurry...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No, I'm fine.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Really? You don't think that's a little inappropriate. (She's wearing a tank top and has her belly sticking out.)

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Good God man don't anger it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross, it is 100 degrees outside. For the first time in weeks, I am somewhat comfortable.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Fine! Fine! Y'know what? Whatever you want. Okay? You're the mommy.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh uh-uh pal! Don't call me mommy! It's bad enough you call your own mother that. (He looks at Monica.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm actually with her on this one.
Inside Joey's Premiere, he is intently watching the movie.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (onscreen) "I thought I knew who the enemy was, but it was you all along."

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (To Chandler) Okay, this is it. It's my big fight scene coming up. (He looks over and Chandler and notices that he's asleep.)
Dr. Long's Office, Ross and Rachel are waiting for the doctor. Ross is drumming his fingers on the bed.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Can I ask you something?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Uh-huh.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: When Carol was pregnant with Ben...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Mmm?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: ...were you this irritating?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Wow!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Excuse me?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh nothing. Nothing! Just uh, you've been a little short with me lately. I'm not trying to irritate you.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well then you just must have a natural talent for it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what? The doctor will be in soon, why don't we not speak until then.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (silently) Okay. (Pause) Seriously, breathe louder Ross! That's great!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know we should probably ask the doctor if she even knows how to deliver a baby that's half human and half pure evil!
Dr. Long enters.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi Dr. Long, how are you?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: (to Rachel) Oh, you're nice to her.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: She has the drugs!

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: We'll do a quick check.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay. (Rachel lies back.)

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: So, eight days late huh?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: You must be a little uncomfortable.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Eh, just a tad.

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: You're about 80 percent effaced, so you're on your way. It still could last a little while longer. If you're anxious there are a few ways to help things along.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Do them!!

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: Actually, they're things you can do. Just some home remedies, but in my experience I've found that some of them are quite effective.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, we are ready to try anything.

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: Okay, there's an herbal tea you can drink.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: You can take some caster oil, there's eating spicy foods...

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Great! We will do all of those.

lines.speaker: Dr. Long
lines.text: ...taking a long walk, and then there's the one that's proved most effective: sex.
Rachel turns and looks at Ross.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: You've got to be kidding me!
Commercial Break
Joey's Premiere, the movie is ending and it takes the applause to wake up Chandler.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Good job Joe! Well done! Top notch!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You liked it? You really liked it?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Oh-ho-ho, yeah!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Which part exactly?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: The whole thing! Can we go?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Oh no-no-no, give me some specifics.

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I love the specifics, the specifics were the best part!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey, what about the scene with the kangaroo? Did-did you like that part?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I was surprised to see a kangaroo in a World War I epic.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: You fell asleep!! There was no kangaroo! They didn't take any of my suggestions! That's for coming buddy. I'll see you later. (Starts to walk out.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Don't go! I'm sorry. I'm so sorry! (Sees another guy who is still asleep.) Look! This guy fell asleep! He fell asleep too! Be mad at him! (Looks at him more closely.) Or, call an ambulance.
Central Perk, Ross and Rachel are there as Phoebe and Monica enter.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: What did the doctor say? Any news on when the baby will come?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: No. But she did give us some ideas on how to induce labor.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Yeah, we tried them all. We went for a walk, uh we tried a special tea, caster oil, spicy food nothing has worked.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, there is one thing that we haven't tried, but someone thinks that, (mimicking Ross) "That will open up a can of worms."

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Well what is it? What is it? If it's gonna help bring the baby here, like today. I mean, I think you should do it.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: It's sex.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Do it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: I'm just saying it's been a really long time for you. I mean, women have needs. Do it, get yours!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Oh I-I don't know about that. No, I think that if the two of you had sex the-the-the repercussions would be catastrophic.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: All right, let's be practical, if Ross isn't willing to do it, he's not the only guy in the world you can have sex with. You can borrow Chandler-Chandler is good!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Monica, what is the matter with you?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Nothing. I just want the baby to be born today.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Why? Why today?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Okay fine! I keep betting Phoebe that you're gonna have the baby and I don't want to lose again!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?! While she's been going through this hell, you've been making money?! You're betting on your friend staying in this misery?! (Phoebe lowers her head and shakes it yes.)

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I'll take that bet.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Well, I'm miserable here! I might as well make some money out it!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Can I get some of that action?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Wait a minute! Now I'm betting against all three of you?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh honey, don't worry. I really do feel like tomorrow's the day.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Oh, okay!
Rachel turns her head to Ross and Phoebe and mouths, "No way."
Monica and Chandler's, Chandler is there as Joey enters.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Hey! Sleeping beauty!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Where have you been?! I tried to call you! I want to talk to you! I still feel so bad!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: (in a baby voice) Oh no, were you upset? Did you lose sleep?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I'm so sorry.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Uh-huh look, the only reason I can over here was to settle things between us! Okay? You've done a lot for me and my career, I wanted to pay you back so I took you to the premiere but you missed it! Okay, so how much do I owe you?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Give me a number, I don't want to owe you anything!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: You don't owe me anything, I don't want you money...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Ah-ah-ah! We're doing this! Okay, now you got me my first set of head shots. Right, how much were those?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: I don't know, five hundred dollars?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, five hundred dollars. What else?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well then there was the second set, the infamous booger head shots.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay, so that's another five hundred. Five hundred and five hundred, that's... (Pauses to figure it out.)

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Do you want a calculator?

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Please!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Here! (Hands him one. Joey adds it up and discovers that he was right.)

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: All right, what else?

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Well uh, there was acting classes, stage combat classes, tap classes...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Which we're still keeping under our hats!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Uh then there was that dialect coach who helped you with that play where you needed a southern accent. Which after twenty hours of lessons still came out Jamaican.

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: What the hell are you talking about, (in a Jamaican accent) "The south will rise again man."

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Yes, money well spent!

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Yeah. Okay, what else? Rent!

lines.speaker: Chandler
lines.text: Okay, two, three years of rent, utilities, food...

lines.speaker: Joey
lines.text: Okay. Okay, so I'm writing you a check for...So you fell asleep during my movie. Big deal right? How do you clear this thing?
Ross and Rachel's, Ross and Rachel are trying the home remedies again.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Come on, finish your enchilada.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Ross I-We tried all the spicy food. It's not working.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay here, have one of these peppers. Oh ha... Oh God! So...so hot! (Rubs his eyes.) Oh my-(Laughs.) By the way, you don't want to touch the pepper and then touch your eye.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I am feeling nothing. Speaking of hot, watching you do that really makes me want to have sex with you.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Stop it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh come on Ross, why are we wasting our time with this other stuff?! We know what's gonna work! It's doctor recommended!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm sorry, but we have to have some boundaries! My God, I'm dying.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh come on Ross, we've done it before we'll do it again, it'll be a nice way to bookend the pregnancy.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: This is insane, I'm not gonna make love to you just so that you'll go into labor.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Make love? What are you a girl?

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Always a great way to get in a man's pants.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: But you will, you will be performing a service. Okay? Just-just think of me as a ketchup bottle, y'know you sometimes you have to bang on the end of it just to get something to come out.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I love when you talk dirty to me.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh, I know it. You're right. That's not sexy. Oh...Oh! (Drops a fork on the floor.) Whoops! Oh, I seem to have dropped my fork. Let me just bed over and get it. (Tries too, but can't quite seem to make it.) Oh God!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Okay enough! This is, this is not going to happen.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Come on Ross! I'm miserable here! Come on! You started this, now you finish it! Come on wuss, make love to me.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Y'know what?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: What?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Forget it.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh wow! What now Ross you're not gonna talk? How on earth will you ever annoy me? Oh wait a minute, I know. (Mimics his breathing.) I mean you'd think the damn jalepeno would've cleared up your sinuses, but no!! That's not enough... (Ross jumps over and kisses her.) What are you doing?!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I'm getting that baby out of you!
They kiss again.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: (breaking the kiss) Oh God!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Oh, I know.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Oh no. No-no! I think my water just broke.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: I am good. Okay! Okay! Uh, I got the pillow! I got the bag! You got the keys?

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay! I got the keys! Okay! Okay!

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Hey!

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Yeah.

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: We're having a baby.
They hug and then kiss one more time.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: I didn't uh, really have time to read this part of the books, but do you think we have time to...

lines.speaker: Ross
lines.text: Not so much.

lines.speaker: Rachel
lines.text: Okay.
Closing Credits
Monica and Chandler's, Monica is paying Phoebe.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Two hundred.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Thank you!

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: That's it. I'm done. I don't care when the baby comes, no more betting.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Okay.
The phone rings and Monica answers it.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: Hello? (Listens) Uh-huh. (Listens) Uh-huh. (Listens) Okay. (Hangs up.) I guess we can bet one more time.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: Is Rachel having the baby?

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: How did you know that?! (Runs to yell at Joey's apartment.) Joey! Chandler!! It's time!

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: They're at the coffeehouse.

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: You know everything!! Oh wait, double or nothing. I bet you the baby is over seven pounds. (Phoebe isn't interested.) I bet you it has hair. (She's still not interested.) I bet you it's a girl.

lines.speaker: Phoebe
lines.text: We know it's a girl! (Exits.)

lines.speaker: Monica
lines.text: (following her) I'll give you really good odds.
End
